testcase.name: verifyStatusWhenNoBackupHasRun
testcase.system-out: Last File = None Last Run = None Status = Scheduled Passed — System handles no backup history correctly

testcase.name: verifyBackupStatusFlow
testcase.system-out: Page background color:#000000 Card backgroound color: #ffffff Card border-radius: 12px Card box-shadow:rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 0px 0px 15px 0px Card padding:25px 35px

testcase.name: verifyCountdownReachesZeroAndNextRunUpdates

testcase.name: verifyCountdownTimerStyling
testcase.system-out: Countdown font size: 22.4px Countdown color (hex): #c62828 Countdown text: 00h 00m 02s

testcase.name: verifyCountdownTimerisAccurate
testcase.system-out: Raw Next Run Text = Next Scheduled Run: 2026-05-19 13:08:00 Clean Next Run Text = 2026-05-19 13:08:00 Countdown UI = 23h 59m 59s

testcase.name: verifyHandlingFailedBackups

failure.message: Backup status should be 'Failed' expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.name: verifyHeadingAndLabelsStyling
testcase.system-out: Heading font size: 24px Label 'Scheduled Time:' - Font: 700, Size: 16px, Color: rgb(0, 0, 0) Label 'Last File:' - Font: 700, Size: 16px, Color: rgb(0, 0, 0) Label 'Last Run:' - Font: 700, Size: 16px, Color: rgb(0, 0, 0) Label 'Status:' - Font: 700, Size: 16px, Color: rgb(0, 0, 0) Label 'Next Scheduled Run:' - Font: 700, Size: 16px, Color: rgb(0, 0, 0) Value 'Failed' - Font: 700, Size: 16px, Color: rgb(255, 0, 0) Value '2026-05-19 13:09:00' - Font: 400, Size: 16px, Color: rgb(0, 0, 0) UI styling verified for headings, labels, and values.

testcase.name: verifyLastFileNameValidation
testcase.system-out: UI Last File value = Last Run: 2026-05-18 13:10:00

testcase.name: verifyLongFileNameWrapsInsideCorrectly
testcase.system-out: UI Shows: Last File: This_is_a_very_very_long_backup_filename_with_special_chars_@_#_$_%_and_more_______________________________final_test_file.txt overflow = visible white-space = normal overflowWrap = normal wordWrap = normal Long filename displayed correctly and wraps inside UI

testcase.name: verifyNextScheduledRunCalculatedCorrectly
testcase.system-out: UI Raw: Next Scheduled Run: 2026-05-18 13:12:59 UI Next Run: 2026-05-18 13:12:59 Time Difference: 1 sec Next Scheduled Run verified successfully!

testcase.name: verifyNoSensitiveDataLeakage
testcase.system-out: Current Status: Current Status: Scheduled Current Status: Scheduled Current Status: Scheduled Current Status: Scheduled Current Status: Scheduled Current Status: Scheduled Current Status: Scheduled Current Status: Scheduled Current Status: Scheduled Current Status: Scheduled Current Status: Scheduled Current Status: Scheduled Current Status: Scheduled Current Status: Scheduled Current Status: Scheduled Current Status: Scheduled Current Status: Scheduled Current Status: Scheduled Current Status: Scheduled Current Status: Scheduled Current Status: Scheduled Current Status: Success Last File Shown: Last File: file2.txt Security Validation Passed – No sensitive data leakage detected.

testcase.name: verifyPageRefreshPerformance
testcase.system-out: Initial Countdown:23h 59m 52s Initial Status: Success Cycle 1 - Countdown: 23h 59m 36s Cycle 1 - Status: Success Cycle 2 - Countdown: 23h 59m 20s Cycle 2 - Status: Success Cycle 3 - Countdown: 23h 59m 04s Cycle 3 - Status: Success Cycle 4 - Countdown: 23h 58m 48s Cycle 4 - Status: Success Page refreshed smoothly without any flicker or data loss

testcase.name: verifyResponsiveLayout
testcase.system-out: Checking UI in DesktopView:1366x768 UI adjusts properly in Desktop, Tablet, Mobile view Checking UI in TabletView:768x1024 UI adjusts properly in Desktop, Tablet, Mobile view Checking UI in MobileView:375x812 UI adjusts properly in Desktop, Tablet, Mobile view

testcase.name: verifyScheduledTimeCorrectlyDisplayed
testcase.system-out: UI Last Run Timestamp = 2026-05-18 13:12:00 BACKUP_HISTORY_FILE = [/usr/local/tomcat/webapps/Docker_backup/backup_history.txt] Absolute Path = /usr/local/tomcat/webapps/Docker_backup/backup_history.txt File Exists = true File Readable = true File Timestamp = 2026-05-18 13:12:00 SUCCESS: UI timestamp matches backup history file.

testcase.name: verifyScheduledTimeMatchesConfiguredTime
testcase.system-out: Configured Time = 16:44 Displayed Time = 16:44 Scheduled Time matches correctly!

testcase.name: verifyTimeFormatvalidation
testcase.system-out: Scheduled Time:16:44 Last Run:2026-05-18 13:13:21 Next Scheduled Run:2026-05-18 16:43:59 All time fields are valid

testcase.system-out: Last Backup: None Total Backups: 34 Files Last Backup: 1 Status: Scheduled

testcase.name: verifyBackupSummaryConsistency
testcase.system-out: Dashboard - Last File: 1 Dashboard - Last Run: None Dashboard - Status: Scheduled Dashboard - Next Run: 34 Backup Status - Last File: None Backup Status - Last Run: None Backup Status - Status: Scheduled Backup Status - Next Run: 2026-05-18 18:44:59 Backup summary is consistent between Dashboard and Backup Status page.

testcase.name: verifyBackupTimeReflectsSystemClock
testcase.system-out: Backup Status Check 1: Backup Status Check 2: Success Dashboard Values: Last Backup Time = 2026-05-18 12:50:35 Total Backups = 35 Files Last Backup = 1 Status = Success FUN-07 Validation Passed – Dashboard updated correctly!

testcase.name: verifyDashboardHandlesLargeBackupCount
testcase.system-out: Total Backups displayed: 35 X position of Total Backups element: 647

testcase.name: verifyGoToLoginButton
testcase.system-out: Navigation to login page verified. Login page elements verified and login button is clickable.

testcase.name: verifyGoToLoginButtonEffect
testcase.system-out: Button hover color: rgb(25, 118, 210)

testcase.name: verifyNoOverlappingElements
testcase.system-out: No overlapping elements detected on the welcome page.

testcase.name: verifyPageLoadSpeed
testcase.system-out: Page load time: 39 ms

testcase.name: verifyScreenReaderCompatibility
testcase.system-out: Screen reader compatible elements verified: numbers and headings display correctly.

testcase.name: verifyStatsAlignment
testcase.system-out: Last Backup Time: 2026-05-18 12:50:35 X position: 397 Total Backups Completed: 35 X position: 397 Files in Last Backup: 1 X position: 397 Status: Success X position: 397 All statistics are aligned correctly.

testcase.name: switchToNewTabOrSameTab
testcase.system-out: Opened in the same tab.

testcase.name: verifyAutofillBehavior
testcase.system-out: Username autocomplete attribute: Login fields are ready for autofill/manual input.

testcase.name: verifyLoginWithMaxChars
testcase.system-out: PASS: Login processed correctly; input validation enforced for max chars.

testcase.name: loginWithSQLInjection
testcase.system-out: SQL Injection attempt blocked successfully

testcase.name: loginWithSpecialCharacters
testcase.system-out: Special characters attempt blocked successfully

testcase.name: signupWithValidCredentials

testcase.name: verifyEmailFormatValidation
testcase.system-out: Validation message: Please enter an email address.

testcase.name: verifyErrorMessagesForInvalidInput
testcase.system-out: Username Msg: Email Msg : Please enter an email address. Password Msg : Confirm password Msg : Validation message: Please enter an email address.

testcase.name: verifyKeyboardNavigationSignup

failure.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for element to be clickable: By.xpath: //a[contains(text(),'Login here')] (tried for 10 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.18.1', revision: 'b1d3319b48' System info: os.name: 'Linux', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '6.17.0-23-generic', java.version: '21.0.3' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.remote.RemoteWebDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: true, browserName: firefox, browserVersion: 123.0, moz:accessibilityChecks: false, moz:buildID: 20240213221259, moz:debuggerAddress: 127.0.0.1:1600, moz:firefoxOptions: {args: [--headless]}, moz:geckodriverVersion: 0.34.0, moz:headless: true, moz:platformVersion: 6.17.0-23-generic, moz:processID: 13389, moz:profile: /tmp/rust_mozprofileRe2ccl, moz:shutdownTimeout: 60000, moz:webdriverClick: true, moz:windowless: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: linux, proxy: Proxy(), se:bidiEnabled: false, se:cdp: ws://172.28.0.3:4444/sessio..., se:cdpVersion: 85.0, se:noVncPort: 7900, se:vnc: ws://172.28.0.3:4444/sessio..., se:vncEnabled: true, se:vncLocalAddress: ws://172.28.0.3:7900, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify} Session ID: bb0da2b9-2484-4ff4-b4a8-c28966928c1b

testcase.name: verifyNoSensitiveInformationInErrorMessages
testcase.system-out: UI messages verified — No sensitive data leakage detected

testcase.name: verifyResponsiveLayout
testcase.system-out: UI adjusts properly in Desktop, Tablet, Mobile view

testcase.name: verifySignupPerformance
testcase.system-out: Signup response time: 36 ms

testcase.name: verifySignupRateLimiting
testcase.system-out: Rate limiting not implemented yet.

testcase.name: tesLongLengthDestDirectoryPath
testcase.system-out: Message after scheduling with long length dest path: Backup scheduled at 12:55 Current Backup Status: Skipped Current Backup Status: Skipped Current Backup Status: Skipped Current Backup Status: Skipped Current Backup Status: Failed Final Backup Status for min-length path: Failed

testcase.name: tesLongLengthSourceDirectoryPath
testcase.system-out: Message after scheduling with long length path: Backup scheduled at 12:56 Current Backup Status: Skipped Current Backup Status: Skipped Current Backup Status: Skipped Current Backup Status: Skipped Current Backup Status: Failed Final Backup Status for min-length path: Failed

testcase.name: testBackupScheduledNextDay
testcase.system-out: Current Time : 12:56:13.431471783 Backup Set Time : 12:55 Scheduled Time : 12:55 Next-Day Scheduled : true

testcase.name: testBackupTimePathEmpty
testcase.system-out: Validation Message: Please fill out this field.

testcase.name: testBoundaryTimeValues
testcase.system-out: Backup message for time 00:00: Backup scheduled at 00:00 Backup message for time 02:45: Backup scheduled at 02:45 Backup message for time 12:00: Backup scheduled at 12:00 Backup message for time 23:59: Backup scheduled at 23:59 Backup message for time 25:99: Backup scheduled at 23:59 Backup message for time 7: Backup scheduled at 23:59 Backup message for time : Backup scheduled at 23:59

testcase.name: testDirectoryTraversalPrevention
testcase.system-out: Validation message: Please fill out this field.

testcase.name: testEmptyFields
testcase.system-out: Empty fields message: No message returned

testcase.name: testEmptySourceDirectoryBehavior
testcase.system-out: Message After Scheduling if source dir has no files: Backup scheduled at 12:57 Current Status: 'Skipped' Final Backup Status for Empty Source Folder: Skipped

testcase.name: testEnableDisableBackup
testcase.system-out: Status after enable: current status: enabled Status after disable: current status: disabled

testcase.name: testFileAsDestination
testcase.system-out: Destination is a file. Expecting backup to fail or skip. Backup message: Backup scheduled at 12:57 Current Status: Skipped Final Backup Status: Skipped

testcase.name: testFontsColorsAndStyles
testcase.system-out: Input font: sans-serif Input font: sans-serif Input font: monospace Button font: sans-serif Button font: sans-serif

testcase.name: testInValidPathBackupStatus
testcase.system-out: Invalid path message:Backup scheduled at 12:57 Final Backup Status: Skipped

testcase.name: testInputFieldPlaceholders
testcase.system-out: Source placeholder: /home/user/source Destination placeholder: /home/user/backup Backup Time placeholder: Backup Time input does not have a placeholder (expected for HTML5 time input)

testcase.name: testMinLengthDirectoryPath
testcase.system-out: Message: Backup scheduled at 12:58 Current Status: Skipped Final Status: Skipped

testcase.name: testMissingAmPmTimeScheduling
testcase.system-out: Validation Message: Please fill out this field.

testcase.name: testMultipleBackupSchedulesUIOnly
testcase.system-out: Latest scheduled backup time in UI: 12:59

testcase.name: testNonexistingDestPath_AutoDirectoryCreation
testcase.system-out: Scheduler Message: Backup scheduled at 12:58 Backup Status Check 1: Skipped Backup Status Check 2: Skipped Backup Status Check 3: Skipped Backup Status Check 4: Skipped Backup Status Check 5: Skipped Backup Status Check 6: Skipped Backup Status Check 7: Skipped Backup Status Check 8: Skipped Backup Status Check 9: Skipped Backup Status Check 10: Success FINAL STATUS: SUCCESS - Auto directory creation verified

testcase.name: testRandomDirectoryPath
testcase.system-out: Random path message:Backup scheduled at 12:59 Final Backup Status: Skipped

testcase.name: testSQLCommandsDirectoryPath
testcase.system-out: Source SQL path message:Backup scheduled at 12:59 Final Backup Status: Skipped

testcase.name: testSetBackupTimeButtonClickableAndHover
testcase.system-out: Background color on hover: rgb(13, 71, 161) Message after clicking button:

testcase.name: testSpecialCharactersDestPath
testcase.system-out: Invalid special character in dest path message:Backup scheduled at 12:59 Final Backup Status: Success

testcase.name: testSpecialCharactersPath
testcase.system-out: Source special character path message:Backup scheduled at 13:00 Final Backup Status: Skipped

testcase.name: testSuccessMessageAfterValidInputs
testcase.system-out: Success message: Backup scheduled at 13:01

testcase.name: testSymbolicLinkHandling
testcase.system-out: Backup message for symlink: backup scheduled at 12:30

testcase.name: testUnsupportedFilesBehavior
testcase.system-out: Message After Scheduling for unsupported files: Backup scheduled at 13:00 Current Backup Status: Skipped Final Backup Status for Unsupported Files: Skipped

testcase.name: testVBackupOverwrite
testcase.system-out: Latest Source File: /data/tmp/file1.txt Destination File To Validate: /data/backup/file1.txt Status Check 1: Skipped BACKUP SKIPPED — Destination unchanged Overwrite Behavior Verified Successfully

testcase.name: testValidPathBackupStatus
testcase.system-out: Valid path message:Backup scheduled at 13:00

testcase.name: testViewStatusLinkClickableAndHover
testcase.system-out: Link color on hover: rgb(13, 71, 161) Current URL after click: http://app:8080/Docker_backup/index.jsp

testcase.name: testdestPathEmpty
testcase.system-out: Validation message: Please fill out this field.

testcase.name: testsourcePathEmpty
testcase.system-out: Validation message: Please fill out this field.

testcase.name: textFileAsSource
testcase.system-out: Source file path message:Backup scheduled at 13:00 Final Backup Status: Skipped

testcase.name: verifyBackupDoesNotRunBeforeScheduledTime
testcase.system-out: Backup did NOT run before scheduled time — Test Passed

testcase.name: verifyBackupLogTemplate
testcase.system-out: UI Status: Skipped UI Status: Skipped UI Status: Skipped UI Status: Skipped UI Status: Success Checking log path: /usr/local/tomcat/webapps/Docker_backup/backup_history.txt Backend Status: Success Backup verified successfully. UI Status: Success, Backend Status: Success

testcase.name: verifyBackupRunsAtScheduledTime
testcase.system-out: ====================================== Backup Scheduling Verification Test Scheduled Time : 13:03 ====================================== Current Status: Skipped Current Status: Skipped Current Status: Skipped Current Status: Skipped Current Status: Success -------------------------------------- Scheduled Time : 13:03 Backup Run Time: 13:03:08 Final Status : Success --------------------------------------

testcase.name: verifyBackupStatusAfterEnablingBackup
testcase.system-out: Backup Status: TEST PASSED — Backup status shown correctly after enabling backup.

testcase.name: verifyBackupStatusPageWhenDisabled
testcase.system-out: Backup Status: TEST PASSED — Backup status shows Disabled correctly.

testcase.name: verifyCurrentStatusWhenBackupDisabled
testcase.system-out: Current Status: Current Status: Disabled Enable Button Text: Enable & Schedule Backup

testcase.name: verifyCurrentStatusWhenBackupEnabled
testcase.system-out: Current Status: Current Status: Enabled Enable Button Text: Update & Reschedule Backup

testcase.name: verifyErrorMessagesForInvalidInput
testcase.system-out: Source Msg: Dest Msg : Time Msg : Please fill out this field.

testcase.name: verifyInputFieldsAlignmentAndVisibility
testcase.system-out: UI Alignment & Visibility Test Passed

testcase.name: verifyLargeDirectoryBackupCompletesSuccessfully
testcase.system-out: Scheduler Message = Backup scheduled at 13:04 Backup Status: Skipped Backup Status: Skipped Backup Status: Success Large Directory Backup Test Passed Successfully!

testcase.name: verifyPermissionDeniedForRestrictedDestinationDirectory
testcase.system-out: Scheduler Message: Backup scheduled at 13:05 Backup Status: Skipped Backup Status: Skipped Backup Status: Skipped Backup Status: Failed

testcase.name: verifyPermissionDeniedForRestrictedSourceDirectory
testcase.system-out: Scheduler Message: Backup scheduled at 13:06 Backup Status: Skipped Backup Status: Skipped Backup Status: Skipped Backup Status: Skipped Backup Status: Failed

testcase.name: verifyResponsiveLayout
testcase.system-out: UI adjusts properly in Desktop, Tablet, Mobile view

testcase.name: verifyStatusChangeOnWelcomePageAfterEnablingBackup
testcase.system-out: Backup Scheduler Status: Current Status: Enabled Current Welcome Page Status: Scheduled

testcase.name: verifyWelcomePageWhenDisabled
testcase.system-out: Backup Status: Disabled
